ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or country the size chart belongs to (e.g., EU, UK, US) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size name (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "hips_cm" TEXT /* Hips measurement in centimeters (e.g., 86-90, 91-95) */,
  "eu_size" TEXT /* EU size equivalent (e.g., 34-36, 36-38) */,
  "uk_size" TEXT /* UK size equivalent (e.g., 8, 10, 12) */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* US size equivalent (e.g., 2-4, 4-6, 6-8) */,
  "fr_es_size" TEXT /* FR/ES size equivalent (e.g., 34-36, 36-38) */,
  "it_size" TEXT /* IT size equivalent (e.g., 38-40, 40-42) */,
  "chest_cm" TEXT /* Chest measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_cm" TEXT /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "shoulder_cm" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length_cm" TEXT /* Sleeve length in centimeters */,
  "inseam_cm" TEXT /* Inseam length in centimeters */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_size FOREIGN KEY ("size") REFERENCES sizes ("size_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region or country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region or country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "is_customizable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size can be customized */,
  "customization_options" TEXT /* Additional options for customization (e.g., plus sizes, petite sizes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart associated with the product */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Current inventory level of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the designer who created the product */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product manager overseeing the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES product_managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_designer_id FOREIGN KEY ("designer_id") REFERENCES designers ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variant */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the variant belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the variant is available in */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the variant */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Current inventory level of the variant */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the variant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the variant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the variant was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total value of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address where the order will be shipped */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Address where the bill will be sent */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the item is */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant the item is */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the item was added to the order */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES product_variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designers" (
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designer */,
  "designer_name" TEXT /* Name of the designer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the designer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the designer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the designer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the designer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the product manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the product manager */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the product manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product manager account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product manager account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)
